page.title: alcohol abuse — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for alcohol abuse: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for alcohol abuse: 116 alterations and 375 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

disclaimer: Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
